prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年吉林省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约8277名、18873名、8653名、17858名、13931名。2022年因断档位次异常后移，2023年大幅回升，2024年再 次后移，2025年回升至13931名，整体波动较大，近两年呈震荡回升态势；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年77人、2022年81人、2023年111人、2024 年79人、2025年80人；2026年计划84人，较2025年扩招4人（+5%），扩招有利于降低竞争烈度，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第79-83名（2026年第80名），属于中上游211，工科实力突出；2023年声誉偏负面（副校长实名举报校长材料造假事件）；2025年 声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌，部分专业无人报考）；2026年声誉偏负面（学术不端事件）；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，整体关注度不高，对报考热度无明显推升 作用；管理科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科；车辆工程、机械工程等工科专业为传统优势方向，与安徽省汽车产业紧密联 动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高位（高热推荐/推荐），对合肥工业大学这类工科强校的报考有正向拉动；本省物理类考生2024年84184人、2025年80421人，2026年总考生110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约80047人，较2025年微降，竞争压力略有缓解；合肥工业大学位于安徽省（非本省），在吉林省招生占比约1%-2%（2025年约80人/全国总计划），属跨省招生，无本 省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13931名、2026年扩招5%使位次数字增大、本省物理类考生微降使竞争略缓、声誉偏负面使报考热度承压、工科专业热度高对 学校有正向吸引等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低录取位次约14492名，区间13992-14992名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13992-14992名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择、一档王牌工科专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（接近13992名）可重点冲刺电气工程、计算机 等热门工科；位次接近区间上限（14992名）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。合肥工业大学工科实力突出，电子信息、电气、车辆等方向就业前景良好，值 得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin Province Science/Physics Category were approximately 8277, 18873, 8653, 17858, and 13931 respectively. In 2022, due to a gap in enrollment, the ranking abnormally shifted backward, then rebounded significantly in 2023, shifted backward again in 2024, and rebounded to 13931 in 2025, showing overall large fluctuations with a recent oscillating upward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for Science/Physics Category: 77 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 80 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 84, an increase of 4 (+5%) compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been stable at 79-83 in recent years (80th in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with strong engineering capabilities. In 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (incident of vice president reporting the president for material falsification). In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, some majors had no applicants). In 2026, reputation was somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident). Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, rated as 'average', overall attention is not high, with no significant boosting effect on application popularity. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at this university. Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and other engineering majors are traditional advantageous directions, closely linked to Anhui Province's automotive industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), positively driving applications to engineering-focused universities like Hefei University of Technology. The number of Physics Category examinees in this province: 84,184 in 2024, 80,421 in 2025, and a total of 110,868 examinees in 2026, with an estimated 80,047 in Physics Category based on approximately 72% in recent years, a slight decrease from 2025, easing competition pressure. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province (not this province), with enrollment in Jilin Province accounting for about 1%-2% (approximately 80 out of total national plan in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 13931, a 5% enrollment expansion in 2026 increasing the ranking number, a slight decrease in Physics Category examinees in this province easing competition, negative reputation suppressing application popularity, and high popularity of engineering majors positively attracting applicants, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 14492, with a range of 13992-14992.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13992-14992, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (close to 13992), prioritize applying for popular engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If the ranking is near the upper limit (14992), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Hefei University of Technology has outstanding engineering capabilities, and majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Vehicle Engineering offer good employment prospects, making it worth serious consideration.
